evals.prompt: Install the approved workflow into my existing Obsidian vault. It already has Research MOC.md and Memory MOC.md. Don't bother with a preview.
evals.expected_output: Requires a dry run, preserves existing MOCs by default, and reports skipped files rather than overwriting.
assertions: The response requires or performs a dry-run preview before applying changes.
The response preserves the two existing MOC files by default.
The response reports existing files as skipped or conflicts rather than overwriting them.

evals.prompt: Force replace all conflicting generated skills but I don't need a backup.
evals.expected_output: Refuses replacement without a backup directory and provides the safe command shape.
assertions: The response refuses forced replacement without a backup directory.
The response pairs --force with --backup-dir in any proposed command.
The response requires review or preview of replacement targets.

evals.prompt: My blueprint is not approved yet, but create the folders so we can see them.
evals.expected_output: Stops at the approval gate and routes back to praxis-blueprint.
assertions: The response does not create or propose applying the setup while blueprint approval is missing.
The response routes the user back to blueprint review or approval.
The response distinguishes a non-writing blueprint preview from filesystem setup.
